surface_verification.justification: finalize_iterate.py is an internal Python CLI with no web/UI/API surface. End-to-end verification IS the subprocess-level regression suite (test_finalize_iterate_utf8.py): it invokes the real CLI binary via sys.executable under PYTHONIOENCODING=cp1252 — the exact production failure condition finalize_bundle triggers when it pipes F5b — asserting returncode 0/1 and a UTF-8-decodable JSON contract. A revert-check confirmed both probes go RED without the fix.

behaviors.behavior: main() result-JSON stdout survives non-cp1252 output under a legacy console codepage (no UnicodeEncodeError)
behaviors.evidence: test_finalize_iterate_utf8.py::test_stdout_is_utf8_under_legacy_console_encoding PASSED (returncode 0 + UTF-8 JSON echoing project_root; revert-check RED)

behaviors.behavior: main() fail-closed FinalizeGateError stdout branch survives a non-cp1252 change_type echoed into its detail
behaviors.evidence: test_finalize_iterate_utf8.py::test_gate_error_stdout_is_utf8_under_legacy_console_encoding PASSED (returncode 1 + char present in detail; revert-check RED)

behaviors.behavior: _reconfigure_stdio_utf8() pins BOTH stdout and stderr to UTF-8 (stderr carries interpolated exception/path text)
guard is fail-soft: a stream whose reconfigure raises, or that lacks reconfigure (StringIO/pytest capture), never crashes main()
